meaning: adj.束带的,装甲的,佩礼带的
examples: The dress was belted at the waist.
He belted out Sinatra and Beatles hits.
He belted the ball right out of the park.
Harper, the 20-year-old outfield phenom, belted two solo home runs to provide all the scoring.
On campus, I watched the well-fed, sane, secure, shiny-haired, and leather-belted students pass me by.
